title: Yao Mengyun
content:
Yao Mengyun
 is a third-generation member of the 
Yao Family
.

History
[
]

When she was young, her mother, the most talented person of her generation, was devoured by the 
ancient lamp
's spirit under 
Blood God
's control. Afterwards, her mother gave birth to her elder sister named 
Yao Bingyun
 and her.   

Later, Blood God ordered 
Yao Yun
 to bring the two sisters to his hall and declared the two were to be refined into the ancient lamp's spirit. In the end, only she was refined while her elder sister was spared.
